name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names
notes: This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining process starts.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
